name: Dashboard
description: User home dashboard: a page that folds existing collections into stats, not a new data model. Owns no collection and no schema -- it reads ai_usage (AI spend, grouped by model), tasks (counts by status), /api/activity (recent activity), and one-line counts from a few other collections (notes/contacts/invoices), all fetched from the browser with the caller's own session so each collection's own permissions/rules.json governs what shows up. Served at /dashboard by the single-segment site-object convention (/dashboard -> site_dashboard, same as site_activity -> /activity and site_tasks -> /tasks) -- no site_routes record is seeded or required. Ported from a private predecessor-system audit, not part of this repo: that system's dashboard also folded in a wallet/billing balance, which is infra-deferred here (no Stripe integration is built) and left out of this v1.
